title: neuroloma scapigerum
intro: Neuroloma scapigerum, also known as the Scapigerum plant, is a type of flowering plant in the gentian family, native to the Himalayas. The Scapigerum plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Neuroloma scapigerum include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate digestive issues, and exhibit antioxidant properties. Herbal preparations of Neuroloma scapigerum include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various health conditions.
